summary: Calendar & Availability UI Verification Complete - All features working correctly. BookingDateRangePicker shows month navigation arrows, past dates disabled (grayed out), blocked dates from API (April 1-5, 20-25) correctly disabled, and date range selection works with popover auto-close.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility enhancement recommended

success_rate.backend: 100% - Availability API returns 28 blocked dates including PENDING bookings

context_for_next_testing_agent: All calendar features verified. BookingDateRangePicker component uses react-day-picker v9 with standard CSS. Navigation arrows are rdp-button_previous and rdp-button_next classes. Day buttons use rdp-day_button class. Disabled dates have disabled attribute set correctly.

1_month_navigation_arrows.test: Calendar shows < > navigation arrows next to month name
1_month_navigation_arrows.evidence: Screenshot shows arrows at top-right of calendar header (rdp-button_previous, rdp-button_next)

2_past_dates_disabled.test: March 1-10 dates are grayed out and disabled
2_past_dates_disabled.evidence: Screenshot shows first row dates (1-10) with reduced opacity and disabled state

3_april_blocked_dates_disabled.test: April 1-5 and 20-24 blocked dates are disabled when blockedDates loaded
3_april_blocked_dates_disabled.evidence: Playwright test confirmed disabled=['1','2','3','4','5','20','21','22','23','24'] in April calendar

4_date_range_selection.test: Date range selection works - select start date, then end date, popover closes
4_date_range_selection.evidence: Selected April 15-17, button shows '15 Apr — 17 Apr (2 nights)', popover auto-closed

5_home_page_date_picker.test: Home page uses BookingDateRangePicker with mode='range'
5_home_page_date_picker.evidence: data-testid='home-date-picker' found on home page, opens react-day-picker v9 calendar

6_availability_api_blocked_dates.test: Availability API returns 28 blocked dates including PENDING bookings
6_availability_api_blocked_dates.evidence: curl returns blockedDates array with 28 dates: April 1-5, 20-25, May 1-5, July 15-18, Oct 1-5, Nov 1-3

7_price_breakdown.test: Price breakdown shows after date selection
7_price_breakdown.evidence: 2 nights × ฿35,000 = ฿70,000 + 5% service fee (฿3,500) = ฿73,500 grand total

ui_verification.navigation_arrows: Visible at top-right of calendar (< > buttons)
ui_verification.past_dates: Correctly disabled via minDate prop (default: today)
ui_verification.blocked_dates: Correctly disabled via blockedDates prop from availability API

screenshots_taken: home_calendar_open.png - Home page calendar with March 2026
booking_modal_calendar.png - Booking modal with March calendar
calendar_april_blocked.png - April 2026 showing blocked dates 1-5, 20-25 grayed
full_range_selected.png - Dates 15-17 Apr selected, price breakdown ฿73,500
